step_rationale: Adipokine marker of vascular inflammation and ischemic risk.
mechanism: RBP4 is an adipokine associated with vascular inflammation and ischemic event risk, linking epicardial adipose-tissue remodeling to atherothrombotic progression.

references.title: Restricted T-Cell Repertoire in the Epicardial Adipose Tissue of Non-ST Segment Elevation Myocardial Infarction Patients.
Characterization of differentially expressed plasma proteins in patients with acute myocardial infarction.
Retinol-binding protein 4 levels and susceptibility to ischaemic events in men.
